nasb.text: And others are the ones on whom seed was sown among the thorns; these are the ones who have heard the word,

esv.text: And others are the ones sown among thorns. They are those who hear the word,

cnv.text: 那撒在荊棘裡的，是指另一些人；他們聽了道，

ccb.text: 种子落在荆棘丛中，是指人虽然听过道，

csbs.text: 那被撒进话语的‘荆棘丛’是另外一些人，那些人是这样的：他们听了这话语，
